name: zsnd_fade_entry_update_and_queue_completion
description: zSndFadeEntry::UpdateAndQueueCompletion advances one fade, clamps backend-specific volume/gain, stops on completion when requested, and queues completed fades for dispatch.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?TickAndMaybeDispatch@zSndFadeEntry@@QAEHM@Z at 0x4a3ad0 still fails: 246 unmasked mismatches, 52 relocation bytes masked, 9 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 333 bytes, VC object symbol size 272 bytes.

Reviewed triage shows function-entry and control-flow/code-size drift across the backend clamp, callback, and dispatch-queue allocation blocks; this remains functional-only until the zSound fade class/cluster receives a binary-safe pass.
